description: Matched launch-day experiment smoke for the cross-lane inversion correction. Run summary-only with --load-profile config/loads/launch-day.json. Seeds 0-9, 2,000 slots, and max-change denominator 8 intentionally match the saved pre-correction baseline variant both-dynamic-strict-threshold-rb2-windowed; its comparison scalars are preserved in docs/phase-2/experiment-results/cross-lane-inversion-smoke.json. corrected-max-no-floor isolates max(standard quote, urgent quote) max-fee validity while leaving the controllers independent; corrected-max-floor1 applies the alternative 1x controller clamp. Compare both new variants pairwise by seed with the saved baseline. This is a bounded diagnostic comparison, not a powered equivalence test.
